title: euphrasia cisalpina
intro: Euphrasia cisalpina, also known as the Alpine Eyebright, is a flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for treating eye problems, such as conjunctivitis and blepharitis. The health benefits of Euphrasia cisalpina include its ability to soothe and heal eye irritations, reduce inflammation, and improve eye health. Euphrasia cisalpina is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to the affected area or taken internally to promote overall eye health.
